title: Create Rust SpacetimeDB module for click arena
description: Build a Rust SpacetimeDB module with: players table (identity, name, score:u64, joined_at:i64), reducers: join_game(name), click(), leave_game(). Compile to WASM and publish to local server at :3000 as 'clickarena' database.

title: Integration test: full client exercise
description: Write tests that exercise the spacetimedbex client against the click arena module: connect, subscribe, call reducers, verify cache updates, verify PubSub broadcasts.

title: Build LiveView game UI with SpacetimeDB client
description: Create a LiveView page that: connects to SpacetimeDB via Spacetimedbex.Phoenix, subscribes to players table, shows live leaderboard, has join form + click button, calls reducers via the client. Test with multiple browser tabs.

title: Shared bonus button via SpacetimeDB
description: Make bonus button shared state through SpacetimeDB. Add Bonus table + reducers in Rust, subscribe in application.ex, rewrite LiveView bonus logic to use DB state.
close_reason: Implemented shared bonus via SpacetimeDB: Bonus table + spawn_bonus/claim_bonus reducers, subscription in application.ex, LiveView rewritten to use DB-backed bonus state with PubSub sync

title: Scaffold Phoenix LiveView app
description: Create a Phoenix app (outsider_gong) with LiveView. Add spacetimedbex as a path dependency from ../spacetimedbex. Configure PubSub and basic layout.
